purpose: External-report journal for 2026-07-13 plus verified blocker audit and an Obsidian-style connected research index consolidating all prior open TODOs and research avenues.
scope: Documentation-only pass over today's 33 journal/status files (AGENT-259..288), the July operational notes and reports, the MASTER TODO, .agent/DECISIONS.md, and the full BOARD; no science artifacts, solver outputs, scheduler state, registry, or external cfd-modeling-tools files modified.
key_findings: Three stale/false blockers identified for scrub from CLAUDE.md/MASTER TODO: OF12 reconstructPar segfault (fixed by OF13), 'no mesh for GCI' (Ethan family readable since 2026-07-09), and 'CFD has no radiation' (superseded by AGENT-277/287).

Genuinely-open frontier blockers: closure-QOI mesh GCI not publication-ready, refined-mesh T reconstruction corruption, thermal CFD-to-1D parity/internal-development model, upcomer onset data sparsity, predictive heater/cooler/wall-layer submodels, and the Fluid external-boundary API gap.
Cooler/HX boundary is the first-order thermal error: baseline fixed-mdot mean-abs Tmean error 63.746 K drops to 4.456 K when CFD cooler duty is imposed.
Production friction closure is F3_shah_apparent; F4 buoyancy and F5 Ri corrections remain unvalidated/failed candidates.
documentation_anomalies: AGENT-276 holds a board claim but has no status/journal/import file and incomplete outputs (logged for reopen in AGENT-278).
AGENT-277 README contradicts its decision JSON on microcase_confirmed (logged for reopen in AGENT-278).
open_questions_for_user: Approve a separate coordinator task to scrub the three stale blockers from CLAUDE.md and the MASTER TODO.
Confirm whether AGENT-276 (no-radiation fixed-mdot replay) results are still needed before reopening it.
